violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

relatedNodes.html:
<article id="unified-card-301-red..." class="
        unified-car..." aria-labelledby="card-title-301-redir..." aria-describedby="card-desc-301-redire..." role="article" tabindex="0">

any.message: Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.03 (foreground color: #6b7280, background color: #1f2937, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

nodes.failureSummary:
